_README: Canonical manifest of your Notion IDs. Copy to ../notion-ids.json and edit. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — your agent instructions and scripts point here instead of hardcoding IDs inline, so a recreated database is fixed in one place. Validate with `npm run check:notion` (structural always; live resolution if NOTION_TOKEN is set). `kind` is 'page' or 'data_source' (a data_source_id is what create-pages/update-page target inside a database). The IDs below are placeholders — replace them.
